_comment: Builder Loops verification manifest. install = npm install only (no browser-binary download, which restricted sandboxes block). The evaluator verifies product behavior itself; the acceptance gate here is the deterministic unit/build suite. The Playwright e2e (npm run test:e2e) is available locally and in capable CI but is intentionally not part of the sandbox gate.
acceptance: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run preview-build
